evals.prompt: Add a Docker Python lab to docs/intermediate/22-lists-docker.md that teaches list operations. Include three labs: one showing how to create and print a list, one showing append/remove, and one showing list comprehensions. Make sure the shared CSS and JS are wired up in mkdocs.yml.
evals.expected_output: A markdown file with three docker lab blocks (suffixes 1, 2, 3), correct element IDs, working onclick handlers, a 'start the service' instruction, and verification that docker-lab.css/js are in mkdocs.yml.

assertions.name: three_labs_present
assertions.description: File contains exactly three docker lab divs with suffixes 1, 2, and 3

assertions.name: correct_element_ids
assertions.description: Every lab has docker-lab-N, docker-code-N, docker-editor-N, docker-buttons-N, docker-run-N, docker-reset-N, docker-output-N for N in 1,2,3

assertions.name: correct_onclick_handlers
assertions.description: Run buttons use runDocker('N') and Reset buttons use resetDocker('N') with matching suffix

assertions.name: service_instruction_present
assertions.description: Page includes instruction to run bash scripts/run-python-docker.sh before using labs

assertions.name: no_inline_css_or_js
assertions.description: Page does not contain <style> or <script> blocks — all styling/logic comes from shared files

evals.prompt: Create a single Docker Python lab for a new page docs/intermediate/23-strings-docker.md that shows string methods. The starter code should demonstrate upper(), lower(), split(), and join(). Include experiment suggestions.
evals.expected_output: A markdown file with one docker lab block (suffix 1), starter code demonstrating four string methods, experiment suggestions, and a service startup reminder.

assertions.name: single_lab_suffix_1
assertions.description: File contains exactly one docker lab using suffix '1'

assertions.name: demonstrates_string_methods
assertions.description: Starter code includes upper(), lower(), split(), and join() calls

assertions.name: has_experiments_section
assertions.description: Page includes experiment suggestions after the lab

assertions.name: no_input_calls
assertions.description: Starter code does not use input() — Docker runner has no stdin

assertions.name: textarea_has_no_leading_indentation
assertions.description: Python code inside the textarea starts at column 0, not indented under the HTML tags

evals.prompt: I already have docs/intermediate/24-functions-docker.md with one docker lab (suffix 1) about defining functions. Add a second lab (suffix 2) that shows a recursive function for factorial, and a third lab (suffix 3) that shows a function with default arguments.
evals.expected_output: Two new docker lab blocks appended to the existing page with suffixes 2 and 3, each with correct IDs and onclick handlers. Lab 2 demonstrates recursion (factorial), Lab 3 demonstrates default arguments.

assertions.name: new_labs_have_suffixes_2_and_3
assertions.description: File now contains docker lab divs with suffixes 2 and 3

assertions.name: factorial_in_lab_2
assertions.description: Lab 2 starter code defines and calls a factorial function using recursion

assertions.name: default_args_in_lab_3
assertions.description: Lab 3 starter code demonstrates a function with at least one default parameter

assertions.name: no_suffix_collision
assertions.description: No element IDs are duplicated — suffix 1 elements still present, suffix 2 and 3 are new
